title: Joel Embiid, 76ers too much for Celtics without Jayson Tatum in Game 7: 6 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Boston Celtics Embiid outmatched Boston in the paint once again, finishing Saturday's game with 34 points.
Joel Embiid outmatched the Celtics in the paint Saturday.

(Danielle Parhizkaran/Globe Staff) The Celtics had multiple opportunities to extend their season in a wild Game 7 against the 76ers on Saturday, but Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey were too much for the third straight game, and the Celtics bowed out in a 109-100 loss.

title: Celtics’ Cinderella story comes to an end in Game 7 against Joel Embiid, 76ers
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Celtics Boston's Jayson Tatum-less lineup brought it to a No.
2 seed, but was no match for Philadelphia Saturday.
Jaylen Brown carried the Celtics all season, and he did his best to will them into the second round on Saturday night.

title: Red Sox leave bases loaded 3 times in 6-3 loss to Astros
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Boston Red Sox Starting pitcher Connelly Early also tossed his worst outing of the year.
The Red Sox’ offensive struggles continued Saturday.
AP Photo/Mark Stockwell ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: Jayson Tatum (left knee stiffness) will miss Game 7 against Philadelphia
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics "He came in today with knee discomfort we decided - the medical team and myself decided for him not to play," Mazzulla said.
Jayson Tatum is experiencing back-of-knee stiffness, according to Joe Mazzulla.
AP Photo/Matt Slocum Celtics forward Jayson Tatum will miss Saturday night’s Game 7 against Philadelphia, coach Joe Mazzulla told reporters.

title: Review & Setlist: Maya Hawke delivers soulful set in Somerville
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Concert Reviews The night might not have been about spectacle, but Hawke’s performance emphasized something greater: connection.
Maya Hawke (center) performs with violinist Odessa Jorgensen (left) and her new husband Christian Lee Hutson (right) on the guitar at Somerville's Crystal Ballroom May 1.
Samantha Genzer/Boston.

title: Steve Schirripa talks his new kids book, ‘The Sopranos,’  and more
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: Local News The actor with local ties and his famous Dachshund WillieBoy team up for “WillieBoy Eats the World.
” Steve Schirripa and WillieBoy sit by the beach.
Courtesy/Steve Schirripa The public is star-struck when they see him walking down the street.

title: What to know about the new GBH merger

bullets: Local News GBH and New England Public Media are planning a merger to expand the statewide news network.

title: East Boston man indicted on federal gun charges, including possession of a machine gun
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Local News Prosecutors say that ghost guns, conversion devices, and a 3D printer were seized in a search of Angel Negron’s Eastie apartment.

Police say they found three privately made firearms (ghost guns), four machine gun conversion devices, a 3D printer, five magazines and 31 privately made firearm receivers during the search of an East Boston apartment.
Courtesy/U.

title: The 2025-26 Boston Bruins exceeded expectations. But they’ve got a lot of work to do.
